source: Back to School Sale Live Sourcing for Beginners + Live Q and A.txt @00:16:04.639 — Puma slide (revisited), 23% ROI (target 30%) / exactly $3 profit; narrator ultimately passes ('I'm sure the price is going to go down'). Profit sits exactly at our $3 floor (passes that check); only ROI misses. CORRECTION: with a fair baseline (bsr/offers filled in) the real weighted score clears the review threshold — the narrator's actual reason for passing was price VOLATILITY ('I'm sure the price is going to go down'), a forward-looking concern our snapshot-based scorer has no field for.
